29:45.arabic: ٱتْلُ مَآ أُوحِىَ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ ٱلْفَحْشَآءِ وَٱلْمُنكَرِ ۗ وَلَذِكْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَكْبَرُ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تَصْنَعُونَ
29:45.english: Recite what has been revealed to you of the Book and establish prayer. Indeed, prayer prohibits immorality and wrongdoing, and the remembrance of Allah is greater. And Allah knows what you do.
29:45.score_notes: Tiny, punchy. The word from Allahu Akbar. dhikr = salah.

lesson_use.heading: 8 · أَكْبَرُ (greater)
lesson_use.english: And the remembrance of Allah is **greater**
lesson_use.notes: Your word — **أَكْبَر** — but not in the adhān this time. Allah is telling you what matters most: remembering Him is greater than anything else.
